metadata.description: Extended evaluation dataset for DocGPT - Document Q&A RAG System

queries.query_text: What is Microsoft's goodwill from acquisitions?

relevant_documents.reason: Directly mentions $51.0 billion goodwill from Activision Blizzard
Discusses business combinations and intangible assets valuation

queries.expected_answer: Microsoft reported $51.0 billion of goodwill related to Activision Blizzard acquisition in 2024.

queries.query_text: Tell me about Microsoft's productivity and business transformation strategy

relevant_documents.reason: Explicitly discusses reinventing productivity and business processes

queries.expected_answer: Microsoft focuses on continuous innovation through Microsoft 365, LinkedIn, and Dynamics 365.

queries.query_text: What is the Form 1040 standard deduction for married filing jointly in 2025?
queries.expected_answer: The standard deduction for Married Filing Jointly in 2025 is $31,500.

queries.query_text: How does Microsoft address trust and cybersecurity?

relevant_documents.reason: Discusses Secure Future Initiative and earning trust

queries.expected_answer: Microsoft's Secure Future Initiative ensures solutions meet cybersecurity and trustworthy AI standards.

queries.query_text: What sustainability initiatives does Microsoft have?

relevant_documents.reason: Directly addresses water, waste, and ecosystem management

queries.expected_answer: Microsoft has commitments including water access, 89.4% server recycling rate, and AI for biodiversity.

queries.query_text: What are the components of intangible assets in Microsoft's acquisitions?

relevant_documents.reason: Detailed breakdown of technology-based, customer-related, and contract-based intangibles

queries.expected_answer: Technology-based ($11,172M), Customer-related ($2,987M), Contract-based ($39M) totaling $27,597M.

queries.query_text: Tell me about Alphabet's dividend program in Q1 2026
queries.expected_answer: Alphabet declared quarterly dividend of $0.22 per share on April 27, 2026, a 5% increase.

queries.query_text: What was the Nuance acquisition about and its current status?

relevant_documents.reason: Details Nuance convertible notes and redemption status

queries.expected_answer: Nuance convertible notes ($986M) issued 2015-2017 have been substantially all redeemed.

queries.query_text: How do Microsoft's volume licensing programs work?

relevant_documents.reason: Explains volume licensing and Software Assurance

queries.expected_answer: Volume licensing allows multiple licenses with varying requirements. Software Assurance provides upgrade rights.

queries.query_text: What is included in Microsoft 365?
queries.expected_answer: Microsoft 365 is an AI-first platform bringing together Office and productivity services.

queries.query_text: How many organizations did Microsoft support through the Black Communities program?
queries.expected_answer: More than 3,000 organizations in nearly 1,900 Black and African American communities.

queries.query_text: What tax forms are included in this document collection?
queries.expected_answer: The collection contains 2025 Form 1040 tax forms with income, deductions, and credits sections.

queries.query_text: What Windows 11 features are mentioned in the annual report?
queries.expected_answer: Windows 11 includes Copilot, security/privacy features, Dev Home, and performance innovations.

queries.query_text: How does Microsoft's server products compete in the market?

relevant_documents.reason: Discusses competition from HP, IBM, Oracle, and Linux

queries.expected_answer: Competes with HP, IBM, Oracle Unix systems, and various Linux offerings.

queries.query_text: What farm advisory agent investor topics are covered?

relevant_documents.reason: Lists scaling, ROI, economics, acquisition, and retention

queries.expected_answer: Covers scaling infrastructure, investor ROI, unit economics, customer acquisition, and retention.

queries.query_text: What is the standard deduction for a single filer in 2025?
queries.expected_answer: The 2025 standard deduction for Single/MFS is $15,750.

queries.query_text: What is the Head of Household standard deduction for 2025?

relevant_documents.reason: Lists Head of Household deduction as $23,625

queries.expected_answer: The 2025 standard deduction for Head of Household is $23,625.

queries.query_text: Describe the complete tax calculation process from the Form 1040
queries.expected_answer: Calculate taxable income, apply deductions, add taxes/credits, determine refund or payment.

queries.query_text: What was Microsoft's dividend per share in fiscal 2024?
queries.expected_answer: Microsoft paid $0.75 per quarter in fiscal 2024, totaling $3.00 per share.

queries.query_text: What was Microsoft's dividend per share in fiscal 2023?
queries.expected_answer: Microsoft paid $0.68 per quarter in fiscal 2023, totaling $2.72 per share.

queries.query_text: What is the role of Schedule EIC in Form 1040?

relevant_documents.reason: Mentions Schedule EIC for qualifying children

queries.expected_answer: Schedule EIC is attached for taxpayers claiming Earned Income Tax Credit with qualifying children.

queries.query_text: How does AI benefit ecosystem and biodiversity management?

relevant_documents.reason: Discusses AI-assisted bioacoustics for ecosystem management

queries.expected_answer: AI enables ecosystem management through AI-assisted bioacoustics monitoring and solutions.

queries.query_text: What is Microsoft's Secure Future Initiative?

relevant_documents.reason: Defines Secure Future Initiative for design and operation

queries.expected_answer: Initiative advancing how Microsoft designs, builds, tests, and operates technology securely.

queries.query_text: How is Form W-2 used in income reporting on Form 1040?

relevant_documents.reason: States W-2 box 1 amount goes on line 1a

queries.expected_answer: Total W-2 box 1 amount is reported on Form 1040 line 1a.

queries.query_text: What financial instruments did Alphabet issue in Q1 2026?
queries.expected_answer: Alphabet issued $31.1 billion in senior unsecured notes for general corporate purposes.

queries.query_text: What dependent-related information is covered in Form 1040?

relevant_documents.reason: Contains dependent instructions and age requirements

queries.expected_answer: Form 1040 covers dependent exemptions, age requirements, and blind dependent rules.

queries.query_text: Which Microsoft products enhance workplace collaboration?
queries.expected_answer: Microsoft 365, LinkedIn, and Dynamics 365 are leading productivity and collaboration platforms.

queries.query_text: What government and nonprofit programs does Microsoft support?
queries.expected_answer: Microsoft supports programs like Nonprofit Tech Acceleration for Black Communities.

queries.query_text: How is goodwill treated for tax purposes?

relevant_documents.reason: States goodwill not deductible for income tax

queries.expected_answer: Goodwill from acquisitions is generally not deductible for income tax purposes.

queries.query_text: What is Microsoft's Surface device strategy?

relevant_documents.reason: Mentions Surface family in device strategy

queries.expected_answer: Surface family devices drive innovation and stimulate demand in Windows ecosystem.

queries.query_text: What are the detailed components and values of intangible assets?

relevant_documents.reason: Breakdown with gross and amortized values

queries.expected_answer: Technology-based $11,172M net, Customer-related $2,987M net, Contract-based $39M net.

queries.query_text: How does Microsoft's cybersecurity capability differentiate it from competitors?
queries.expected_answer: Microsoft's ability to solve complex cybersecurity challenges effectively differentiates it.

queries.query_text: What types of employee income are reported on Form 1040?

relevant_documents.reason: Lists W-2, household wages, tips, Medicaid waiver, dependent care

queries.expected_answer: Employee income includes W-2 wages, household wages, tips, Medicaid waiver, and dependent care benefits.

queries.query_text: What is Microsoft's cloud hardware recycling rate?
queries.expected_answer: Microsoft achieved 89.4% reuse and recycle rate for servers and components.

queries.query_text: Where can I find information about Activision Blizzard acquisition details?
queries.expected_answer: See Note 8 – Business Combinations in the annual report for detailed acquisition information.

queries.query_text: How are dependent exemptions and credits handled in 2025 tax calculations?
queries.expected_answer: Dependents affect calculations through exemptions and credits like Child Tax Credit.

queries.query_text: What is Microsoft's approach to creating personal computing experiences?
queries.expected_answer: Microsoft aims to create personal computing through innovative technology.

queries.query_text: Which documents discuss specific financial performance metrics?
queries.expected_answer: Multiple documents contain financial metrics including assets, dividends, and financing.

queries.query_text: What global communities does Microsoft focus on?

relevant_documents.reason: Focus on young people, women, rural, Global South

queries.expected_answer: Microsoft focuses on young people, women, rural communities, and the Global South.

queries.query_text: How are expense items structured and presented in Form 1040?

relevant_documents.reason: Shows step progression from income to final calculations

queries.expected_answer: Form 1040 progresses through deductions, dependencies, credits to final payment/refund.

queries.query_text: What is the current redemption status of Nuance convertible notes?
queries.expected_answer: Substantially all $986 million Nuance convertible notes have been redeemed.

queries.query_text: What are Microsoft's zero waste and circular economy goals?

relevant_documents.reason: Discusses zero waste journey and circularity

queries.expected_answer: Microsoft's zero waste journey includes waste reduction and advancing circularity for hardware.

queries.query_text: What was the total dividend payout in fiscal 2024 in millions?
queries.expected_answer: Microsoft paid $22,296 million in total dividends in fiscal 2024.

queries.query_text: What was the total dividend payout in fiscal 2023 in millions?
queries.expected_answer: Microsoft paid $20,230 million in total dividends in fiscal 2023.

queries.query_text: What percentage increase did Microsoft's dividend have from 2023 to 2024?
queries.expected_answer: Dividend increased approximately 10.3% from $0.68 to $0.75 per quarter.

queries.query_text: How much did Alphabet increase its dividend in April 2026?
queries.expected_answer: Alphabet increased dividend 5% from $0.21 to $0.22 per share.

queries.query_text: What is the accumulation of technology-based intangible assets after amortization?
queries.expected_answer: Technology-based intangible assets: $21,913M gross, $10,741M accumulated amortization, $11,172M net.

queries.query_text: What is the accumulation of customer-related intangible assets after amortization?
queries.expected_answer: Customer-related intangibles: $6,038M gross, $3,051M amortization, $2,987M net.

queries.query_text: What are contract-based intangible assets in acquisitions?
queries.expected_answer: Contract-based intangibles: $58M gross, $19M amortization, $39M net value.

queries.query_text: Are there any material impairments of intangible assets mentioned?
queries.expected_answer: No material impairments of intangible assets were identified in fiscal 2024, 2023, or 2022.

queries.query_text: What household income types are reportable on Form 1040?
queries.expected_answer: Household employee wages not reported on W-2 are separately reportable on Form 1040.

queries.query_text: How are tip income and Medicaid waiver payments reported?

relevant_documents.reason: Lists tip income and Medicaid waiver reporting

queries.expected_answer: Tip income and Medicaid waiver payments have specific lines on Form 1040 for reporting.

queries.query_text: What is the purpose of Line 1e on Form 1040?
queries.expected_answer: Line 1e is for taxable dependent care benefits from Form 2441.

queries.query_text: What is Microsoft's position on privacy and digital safety?

relevant_documents.reason: Discusses privacy and digital safety commitment

queries.expected_answer: Microsoft is committed to privacy and digital safety as core trust principles.

queries.query_text: How does Microsoft position trustworthy AI?

relevant_documents.reason: Emphasizes trustworthy AI as key trust element

queries.expected_answer: Microsoft prioritizes trustworthy AI as essential for earning customer trust.

queries.query_text: What operating system options exist for servers mentioned?

relevant_documents.reason: Mentions Unix and Linux server options

queries.expected_answer: Server platforms include Windows, various Unix versions, and Linux operating systems.

queries.query_text: What is Microsoft's water access target?
queries.expected_answer: Microsoft has established a water access target as part of sustainability goals.

queries.query_text: How does Microsoft approach datacenter waste reduction?
queries.expected_answer: Microsoft reduces waste at campuses and datacenters through circular economy practices.

queries.query_text: What is included in Microsoft's packaging circularity goals?
queries.expected_answer: Microsoft advances circularity for packaging as part of zero waste journey.

queries.query_text: What specific percentage of servers are reused or recycled?
queries.expected_answer: 89.4% of servers and components are reused or recycled.

queries.query_text: What communities benefit from Microsoft's social impact programs?

relevant_documents.reason: Lists employee communities and social impact org employees

queries.expected_answer: Microsoft's programs benefit employee communities and social impact organization employees.

queries.query_text: What is the scale of Microsoft's community program reach in 2024?
queries.expected_answer: Microsoft reached over 3,000 organizations in nearly 1,900 Black and African American communities.

queries.query_text: What is the Nonprofit Tech Acceleration program focus?
queries.expected_answer: Helps nonprofits use technical solutions to modernize and streamline operations.

queries.query_text: How does Microsoft's leadership address racial injustice?

relevant_documents.reason: Discusses racial injustice and inequity work

queries.expected_answer: Microsoft collaborates with partners to address racial injustice through community projects.

queries.query_text: What is the total gross amount of all intangible assets?
queries.expected_answer: Total gross intangible assets: $44,509 million across all categories.

queries.query_text: What is the total accumulated amortization of intangible assets?
queries.expected_answer: Total accumulated amortization: $16,912 million.

queries.query_text: What is the net book value of all intangible assets?
queries.expected_answer: Net book value of intangible assets: $27,597 million.

queries.query_text: When will the Alphabet dividend be payable to shareholders?
queries.expected_answer: The Alphabet dividend is payable on June 15, 2026 to shareholders of record.

queries.query_text: What is the record date for Alphabet's dividend?
queries.expected_answer: The record date for Alphabet's dividend is June 8, 2026.

queries.query_text: Which Alphabet share classes are eligible for the dividend?

relevant_documents.reason: Class A, B, and C shares

queries.expected_answer: Class A, Class B, and Class C shares are all eligible for the dividend.

queries.query_text: What is Microsoft's approach to business process transformation?
queries.expected_answer: Microsoft helps customers create secure, productive work environments through integrated technology.

queries.query_text: How does Microsoft ensure continuous innovation in productivity?
queries.expected_answer: Growth depends on securely delivering continuous innovation in productivity tools.

queries.query_text: What tax forms should I consult for business deductions?
queries.expected_answer: Refer to applicable schedules and forms specific to business income and deductions.

queries.query_text: What does Software Assurance provide to customers?

relevant_documents.reason: Provides rights to new software and upgrades

queries.expected_answer: Software Assurance provides rights to new software and upgrades over contract period.

queries.query_text: How long is a typical Software Assurance contract period?

relevant_documents.reason: Mentions contract period but not specific duration

queries.expected_answer: Contract periods vary based on customer agreements and specific arrangements.

queries.query_text: What are the programmatic requirements for Microsoft volume licensing?
queries.expected_answer: Volume licensing programs have varying programmatic requirements customized to customer needs.

queries.query_text: What benefits do volume licensing programs provide?
queries.expected_answer: Benefits include flexible licensing, cost savings, and program options meeting diverse needs.

queries.query_text: How does the 2024 annual report structure financial information?
queries.expected_answer: Report contains detailed financial statements with notes on acquisitions, assets, and valuations.

queries.query_text: What filing date appears on the Microsoft annual report?
queries.expected_answer: The report was filed on 7/17/26 at 4:50 PM.

queries.query_text: Which page number contains goodwill information?
queries.expected_answer: Goodwill information appears on page 48 of the annual report.

queries.query_text: What document discusses trust, cybersecurity, and privacy?
queries.expected_answer: Page 4 of the annual report comprehensively discusses trust, security, and privacy.

queries.query_text: Which page covers community and social responsibility programs?
queries.expected_answer: Community and social responsibility programs are discussed on page 10.

queries.query_text: Where is information about sustainability and environmental initiatives located?
queries.expected_answer: Sustainability information is located on page 5 of the annual report.

queries.query_text: Which section covers Microsoft's product strategy and innovation?
queries.expected_answer: Product strategy and innovation are covered on page 9.

queries.query_text: What is the relationship between Alphabet and Google in the documents?

relevant_documents.reason: Alphabet earnings release mentions corporate structure

queries.expected_answer: Alphabet is the parent company overseeing corporate operations and capital allocation.

queries.query_text: What recent financial transactions did Alphabet complete?

relevant_documents.reason: Issued senior unsecured notes in Q1 2026

queries.expected_answer: Alphabet issued $31.1 billion in senior unsecured notes in Q1 2026.

queries.query_text: How are Microsoft's different product segments organized?

relevant_documents.reason: References productivity and personal computing segments

queries.expected_answer: Microsoft organizes around Productivity, Business Processes, and Personal Computing segments.

queries.query_text: What competitive pressures does Microsoft face in each segment?

relevant_documents.reason: Discusses server and operating system competition

queries.expected_answer: Microsoft faces competition from diverse players including established vendors and open-source platforms.

queries.query_text: What role does Dev Home play in Microsoft's developer strategy?

relevant_documents.reason: Dev Home is open-source experience for developer productivity

queries.expected_answer: Dev Home is an open-source experience helping developer productivity in Windows.

queries.query_text: What are the security and privacy features of Windows 11?

relevant_documents.reason: Details security features and privacy protections

queries.expected_answer: Windows 11 includes operating system security, application security, and user/identity security.

queries.query_text: How does Copilot integrate into Windows 11?
queries.expected_answer: Copilot in Windows is part of performance and productivity innovations.

queries.query_text: What is the market strategy for first-party Microsoft devices?

relevant_documents.reason: Commits to designing devices to drive innovation

queries.expected_answer: Microsoft designs devices to drive innovation, create categories, and stimulate ecosystem demand.

queries.query_text: What assumptions underlie Microsoft's intangible asset valuations?

relevant_documents.reason: Judgment required for future tax consequences

queries.expected_answer: Valuations require judgement on future economic consequences and market outcomes.

queries.query_text: How do interest and penalties affect income tax accounting?

relevant_documents.reason: Discusses accounting for interest and penalties

queries.expected_answer: Companies account for interest and penalties associated with uncertain tax positions.

queries.query_text: What is significant about residual value of intangible assets?
queries.expected_answer: No significant residual value is estimated for intangible assets.

queries.query_text: How are weighted-average depreciation lives determined?

relevant_documents.reason: Mentions weighted amortization but limited detail

queries.expected_answer: Weighted-average lives reflect expected useful lives of assets.

queries.query_text: What are the credit and payment calculation mechanics on Form 1040?
queries.expected_answer: Credits are claimed and compared against tax liability to determine final payment or refund.

queries.query_text: What direct deposit options are available for tax refunds?

relevant_documents.reason: Mentions direct deposit options via Form 8888

queries.expected_answer: Taxpayers can elect direct deposit options for refunds using Form 8888.

queries.query_text: How is the Child Tax Credit claimed on Form 1040?

relevant_documents.reason: References Schedule 8812 for Child Tax Credit

queries.expected_answer: Child Tax Credit is claimed using Schedule 8812 and referenced on Form 1040.

queries.query_text: What is the qualified business income deduction process?
queries.expected_answer: QBI deduction is calculated using Form 8995 or Form 8995-A and applied to taxable income.

queries.query_text: What documents are required to be attached to Form 1040?
queries.expected_answer: Required attachments include applicable schedules (8812, 8995, etc) and Forms (2441, 8888).

queries.query_text: What penalties apply to late tax payments?
queries.expected_answer: Late payment penalties are assessed on unpaid tax amounts based on IRS rules.

queries.query_text: How is estimated tax calculated and paid?
queries.expected_answer: Estimated taxes are calculated and paid quarterly for those with variable income.

queries.query_text: What is the Combined Annual Report 2024 document page count?

relevant_documents.reason: References annual report but page count not specified

queries.expected_answer: The annual report contains extensive financial and operational disclosures across multiple pages.

queries.query_text: How does Microsoft's strategy differ across geographic regions?

relevant_documents.reason: References Global South and community focus

queries.expected_answer: Microsoft tailors strategies for different regions including focus on Global South development.

queries.query_text: What emerging technology trends does Microsoft highlight?

relevant_documents.reason: Highlights AI integration and developer tools

queries.expected_answer: Microsoft emphasizes AI integration, developer productivity, and security innovations.

queries.query_text: How does Microsoft compare to major competitors in each sector?
queries.expected_answer: Microsoft competes effectively through comprehensive solutions and deep market integration.

queries.query_text: What is the relationship between acquisitions and Microsoft's growth?
queries.expected_answer: Strategic acquisitions like Activision Blizzard expand Microsoft's capabilities and market reach.

queries.query_text: How does Microsoft's business model generate shareholder value?

relevant_documents.reason: Consistent dividend growth reflects value generation

queries.expected_answer: Dividend growth demonstrates strong profitability and capital allocation discipline.

queries.query_text: What are the key differences in Microsoft's market segments?

relevant_documents.reason: Describes Productivity and Personal Computing segments

queries.expected_answer: Segments vary in products (Office vs Windows) but share innovation and integration strategies.

queries.query_text: How do tax incentives affect Microsoft's R&D investments?

relevant_documents.reason: General tax accounting but no specific incentives mentioned

queries.expected_answer: Tax treatment of R&D affects investment return calculations and strategic prioritization.

queries.query_text: What sustainability metrics are most critical for Microsoft's ESG performance?
queries.expected_answer: Key metrics include water access, waste reduction, recycling rates, and biodiversity initiatives.

queries.query_text: How has Microsoft's social impact grown over multiple years?
queries.expected_answer: Microsoft has grown community programs significantly reaching thousands of organizations.

queries.query_text: What is the strategic importance of trustworthy AI to Microsoft?

relevant_documents.reason: Emphasizes trustworthy AI as core trust pillar

queries.expected_answer: Trustworthy AI is essential to earning customer trust and supporting responsible innovation.

queries.query_text: How do Microsoft's security initiatives address modern threats?
queries.expected_answer: Microsoft's comprehensive approach addresses operating system, application, and identity security.

queries.query_text: What is the long-term vision for Microsoft's product ecosystem?

relevant_documents.reason: Commits to device innovation and ecosystem stimulation

queries.expected_answer: Vision emphasizes integrated solutions, innovation across devices, and ecosystem growth.

queries.query_text: How does Alphabet's financial strategy differ from Microsoft's?
queries.expected_answer: Both focus on shareholder returns but through different mechanisms and capital structures.

queries.query_text: What governance structures support Microsoft's decision-making?

relevant_documents.reason: Limited governance detail in provided documents

queries.expected_answer: Microsoft operates under Board oversight with management accountable for strategic execution.

queries.query_text: How does document retrieval performance vary by query domain in evaluation?

relevant_documents.reason: Tax documents tend to be structured

queries.expected_answer: Structured financial/tax content retrieves better than narrative business strategy content.

queries.query_text: What evaluation metrics best capture retrieval quality for complex queries?

relevant_documents.reason: Complex financial accounting queries need NDCG

queries.expected_answer: NDCG@10 and Recall@10 better capture multi-faceted answer requirements than Precision@1.

queries.query_text: How should query difficulty be reflected in performance targets?

relevant_documents.reason: Operational queries more precise than strategic ones

queries.expected_answer: Easy queries should achieve 80%+ precision, medium 70%, hard 60% reflecting complexity.

queries.query_text: What minimum recall level ensures comprehensive answer coverage?
queries.expected_answer: Recall@10 of 70%+ ensures users see most relevant documents for complete understanding.

queries.query_text: How do embedding model choice and chunking strategy interact?
queries.expected_answer: Larger chunks suit semantic embeddings; smaller chunks work with keyword matching.

queries.query_text: What trade-offs exist between retrieval latency and quality?
queries.expected_answer: Reranking improves quality 10-15% but adds 200-500ms latency vs simple retrieval.

queries.query_text: How should evaluation be adapted for production monitoring vs research?
queries.expected_answer: Production needs real-time metrics on sample queries; research uses full offline evaluation.

relevance_scoring.5: Perfectly relevant - directly answers query, contains exact information needed
relevance_scoring.4: Highly relevant - strong match, contains information that substantially answers query
relevance_scoring.3: Moderately relevant - partial match, contains some useful context or related info
relevance_scoring.2: Weakly relevant - tangentially related, might help but doesn't directly address query
relevance_scoring.1: Not relevant - no meaningful connection to query
relevance_scoring.0: Irrelevant - explicitly contradicts or unrelated to query

metrics_explanation.precision@k: Of the top-k retrieved documents, what percentage are actually relevant?
metrics_explanation.recall@k: Of all relevant documents, what percentage appear in the top-k retrieved?
metrics_explanation.mrr: Mean Reciprocal Rank - position of first relevant result (1/position average)
metrics_explanation.ndcg: Normalized Discounted Cumulative Gain - considers ranking quality and relevance

usage_instructions: 1. For each query, retrieve documents from your Qdrant index
5. Track performance across difficulty levels and domains
6. Identify weak areas needing embedding/reranking optimization
